title: goniophlebium angustifolium
intro: Goniophlebium angustifolium, also known as the Narrow-leaf Goniophlebium, is a species of fern native to tropical regions of Asia. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Goniophlebium angustifolium are said to include reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are typically used to make teas, tinctures, or infusions for its medicinal properties.
